page_content:
GEOL322 Mineralogy (4 Credits)

Basic mineralogy for geology majors. The principles of morphologic crystallography, crystal chemistry, and determinative mineralogy. Prerequisite: GEOL120 or GEOL100; and GEOL110. And CHEM131 and CHEM132; or (CHEM135 and CHEM136); or CHEM103.

Restriction: Permission of instructor is required for non-degree seeking students.

GEOL329 Instructional Assistance Practicum (1-2 Credits) Undergraduate teaching assistantship in Geosciences. Individual instruction course. Contact department or instructor to obtain section number.
